title: chrysanthemum japonicum
intro: Chrysanthemum japonicum, also known as the Japanese chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, and it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum japonicum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and sinus congestion, and promoting relaxation and better sleep. Chrysanthemum japonicum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
